name: Mid Level - Technology
description: Professional template for developers with 3-7 years of experience.

content.summary: Results-driven software engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications and microservices. Proven track record of leading technical initiatives that improved system performance and team productivity. Passionate about clean architecture and mentoring junior developers.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Led the migration of monolithic application to microservices architecture, reducing deployment time by 60%
Architected and implemented real-time data processing pipeline handling 10M+ events daily
Mentored 4 junior developers through code reviews, pair programming, and technical design sessions
Reduced infrastructure costs by 35% through optimization of cloud resources and caching strategies

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed customer-facing features used by 500K+ monthly active users
Implemented automated testing framework that increased code coverage from 40% to 85%
Collaborated with product and design teams to deliver features 20% ahead of schedule
